items.title: Bitcoin Data Carving (Ordinals, Inscriptions, BRC-20, Runes)
items.description: Since the Taproot soft fork in 2021, several protocols have emerged that use Bitcoin's script and witness fields to inscribe or associate arbitrary data with individual satoshis. These are collectively known as inscriptions or data carving protocols. The most prominent are Ordinals, BRC-20 tokens, and Runes.
